name: Qualified Foreign Corporation USVI Tax Remission

eligibility.description: The corporation must have less than 10 percent of its total voting power and value owned by United States persons.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Permits the reduction of USVI tax liability for qualified foreign corporations on income derived from sources outside the U.S. that is not effectively connected with a U.S. trade or business.
